# ona_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing Gitpod group by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ona_group" "example" {
  id = "group-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Group ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the group was created.
- `description` (String) Group description.
- `direct_share` (Boolean) Whether the group uses direct sharing.
- `member_count` (Number) Number of members in the group.
- `name` (String) Group name.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID the group belongs to.
- `system_managed` (Boolean) Whether the group is system-managed.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the group was last updated.
